title: ononis natrix subsp. filifolia
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. filifolia, also known as the Mediterranean restharrow or ononis, is a plant species within the Ononis genus that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Ononis natrix subsp. filifolia is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing swelling and pain, and it has been used to treat various conditions such as rheumatism, wounds, and skin irritations. Ononis natrix subsp. filifolia is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its roots, leaves, and flowers are typically used in its medicinal applications.
